---
title: "Data Generation Process Workshop"
author: "Dr. Yue Hu"
format: html
---

Welcome to the sources for the *Data Generation Process*. Learn how to generate data with Dr. Hu.

![](images/goodluck.gif){fig-align="center" height=200}

<br><br>

- [Survey Instrument](/01_surveyInstrument.html)
- [Survey Sampling and Nonrespone](/02_surveySampling.html)
- [Survey Questioning](/03_surveyQuestion.html)
- [Survey Instruction](/04_surveyInstruction.html)
- [Survey Collection](/05_surveyCollection.html)
- [Survey Classification](/06_surveyClassification.html)
- [Coder Training](/07_coderTraining.html)
